title: Use AI to summarize a board (not a row)
excerpt: Is there a way to summarize an entire board using AI? My board already has AI creating summaries for each row, but I want to roll them up and prioritize them in a footer.

posts.author: GrantSullivan (Grant)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to summarize an entire board using AI? My board already has AI creating summaries for each row, but I want to roll them up and prioritize them in a footer.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s in beta, but ‘board level’ ai is coming!

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: rochelleg (Rochelle Gebelius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Grant! We’ve actually just launched RecapIQ, which pulls updates and summaries from your board and turns them into a weekly digest or overview.

It doesn’t live inside the board footer right now, but it does use AI to summarize what’s been done, what’s in progress, and what’s overdue and then sends it out automatically.

Would that kind of automated board summary be useful for you, or are you mainly thinking of something that stays visible inside the board itself?

11920×960 135 KB
